H4: Search ``` ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ``` H1: Custom Business Magnets H2: Business Magnets Product Overview H2: Business Magnets Material Options H2: Business Magnets Finishing Options H2: Business Magnets Production Times H2: Payment Options for Business Magnets H2: Business Magnets Shipping Guidelines H2: Common Uses for Business Magnets H2: Business Magnets Artwork Requirements H2: Why Choose Custom Business Magnets H2: Business Magnets FAQ ``` ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER ```html

Create professional custom business magnets for powerful brand promotion on any magnetic surface. Our durable 30-mil magnetic material with full-color printing and weather-resistant lamination delivers long-lasting marketing impact. Perfect for vehicle advertising, office displays, and promotional campaigns with custom sizes up to 24" x 24" and multiple cut options available. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

``` ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS ```html
``` ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ```html

Business Magnets Product Overview

Custom business magnets provide versatile, removable advertising solutions for magnetic surfaces including vehicle doors, filing cabinets, and metal displays. Our professional-grade magnetic material features 30-mil thickness for superior holding power and durability in outdoor conditions.

Each business magnet includes protective lamination for UV resistance and scratch protection, ensuring vibrant full-color graphics maintain their impact over time. With maximum print dimensions of 24" x 24", these magnets accommodate everything from compact contact information displays to large promotional graphics.

Our business magnets work exceptionally well for service businesses, real estate professionals, and delivery companies seeking cost-effective mobile advertising. The removable nature allows for easy repositioning without surface damage, making them ideal for temporary promotions or vehicle fleet management where truck magnetic signs provide professional brand visibility.

Before ordering, verify your intended surface has magnetic receptivity, as aluminum and plastic panels will not hold magnetic materials securely.

``` ## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ```html

Business Magnets Material Options

Our business magnets utilize premium 30-mil magnetic sheeting that provides exceptional adhesion strength while remaining easily removable. This professional-grade material maintains consistent magnetic pull across the entire surface, ensuring secure attachment during transport and weather exposure.

Every business magnet includes protective UV-resistant lamination that prevents fading, cracking, and weather damage. This coating extends the lifespan of your graphics while maintaining color vibrancy in harsh outdoor conditions including direct sunlight, rain, and temperature fluctuations.

The magnetic base material offers flexibility for curved surfaces while maintaining enough rigidity to prevent wrinkles or bubbling. Our full-color digital printing process delivers sharp text and vibrant images that remain clearly visible from appropriate viewing distances.

Compatible magnetic surfaces include steel vehicle doors, appliances, metal filing systems, and warehouse equipment. The material thickness ensures reliable holding power without leaving residue when repositioned, making these magnets perfect for businesses requiring frequent advertising updates or seasonal promotional campaigns alongside custom car magnets.

``` ## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ```html

Business Magnets Finishing Options

Standard rounded corner finishing provides optimal aerodynamics for vehicle-mounted business magnets, reducing wind resistance that could cause lifting or detachment during highway speeds. This finishing option extends magnet lifespan by preventing corner damage from airflow turbulence.

Square cut finishing delivers crisp, professional edges ideal for indoor applications or stationary displays where wind resistance isn't a concern. This option maximizes the printable area and creates clean geometric presentations for office environments and trade show displays.

Contour cutting allows business magnets to follow specific shapes including logos, text outlines, or custom designs. This premium finishing option creates unique promotional pieces that stand out from standard rectangular formats while maintaining full magnetic functionality.

All finishing options include edge sealing to prevent lamination separation and moisture infiltration. Our precision cutting equipment ensures consistent results across large quantities, maintaining professional appearance standards whether ordering single magnets or bulk promotional sets for comprehensive marketing campaigns.

``` ## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ```html

Business Magnets Production Times

Choose from flexible production schedules ranging from 1-day priority to 5-day economy options based on your timeline requirements. All production times begin after artwork approval and file upload completion.

Priority 1-day production accommodates urgent promotional needs and last-minute marketing campaigns. Express 2-day and Standard 3-day options balance speed with cost-effectiveness for most business requirements.

Economy 5-day production offers significant cost savings for advance planning and bulk orders. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day across all production tiers.

Production time excludes shipping duration, so factor delivery time when planning installation deadlines. Emergency same-day processing may be available through customer service consultation for critical timeline situations.

``` ## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ```html

Payment Options for Business Magnets

All business magnets require full payment before production begins to ensure timely processing and delivery. We accept major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing.

Check payments are accepted but must be received and cleared before production starts, potentially extending your total order timeline. Contact customer service for specific check processing procedures and timeline estimates.

Credit card charges occur only after order approval and artwork finalization, providing security for both parties. This payment timing allows for any necessary design revisions without premature billing.

Large volume orders may qualify for special payment arrangements through direct customer service consultation. Our flexible payment processing ensures smooth transactions for both individual orders and corporate purchasing requirements.

``` ## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ```html

Business Magnets Shipping Guidelines

Standard UPS Ground shipping reaches 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days, with tracking numbers provided upon shipment. Shipping costs calculate based on package weight and destination address.

Expedited shipping options include Overnight, Two-Day, and Three-Day services for time-sensitive installations. Large orders may incur additional shipping charges due to dimensional requirements.

International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation through approved USPS and UPS services only. Contact customer service before ordering for international shipping coordination.

Damaged shipments require return of defective products for replacement processing. Lost packages receive replacement after shipping company confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery date.

``` ## 11) COMMON USES TAB ```html

Common Uses for Business Magnets

Vehicle advertising represents the most popular application for business magnets, providing mobile marketing for service companies, delivery businesses, and professional services. Magnetic vehicle signs offer removable branding without permanent vehicle modification.

Office and retail displays utilize business magnets for changeable information boards, promotional announcements, and seasonal marketing messages. The repositionable nature allows for frequent content updates without surface damage.

Trade show and event marketing benefits from portable magnetic displays that attach to metal booth structures, appliances, or magnetic presentation boards. Easy transport and setup make them ideal for traveling marketing teams.

Real estate professionals use business magnets for temporary property signage, open house promotions, and agent contact information that relocates between listings. Industrial applications include equipment labeling, safety notices, and warehouse organization systems where custom dry erase magnets provide reusable information management solutions.

``` ## 12) ARTWORK TAB ```html

Business Magnets Artwork Requirements

Vector-based files including .eps formats with outlined fonts produce the highest print quality for business magnets. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also print effectively when properly prepared.

Our graphic design team provides professional assistance for artwork optimization and file preparation. Order proofs allow design verification before production, including low-resolution previews and order summary details.

Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, ensuring accurate color reproduction for brand-specific requirements. Contact customer service for color matching consultation and proof coordination.

File uploads should account for the maximum 24" x 24" print dimensions and include appropriate bleed areas for finishing options. Professional design services are available for customers requiring complete artwork creation from concept through production-ready files.

``` ## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT ```html

Why Choose Custom Business Magnets

Custom business magnets deliver exceptional return on investment through reusable, repositionable advertising that maintains professional appearance over extended periods. Unlike permanent signage solutions, magnetic advertising adapts to changing business needs, seasonal promotions, and evolving marketing strategies.

Professional-grade materials and full-color printing capabilities ensure your business magnets represent your brand with clarity and durability. Weather-resistant lamination protects against fading, scratching, and environmental damage that compromises less robust promotional materials.

Flexible sizing options accommodate diverse marketing applications from compact contact information magnets to large promotional displays. The combination of strong magnetic adhesion and easy removability provides advertising versatility unavailable with traditional permanent signage.

Banners.com's expertise in magnetic printing, combined with comprehensive finishing options and reliable production schedules, ensures your custom business magnets meet professional standards while supporting your marketing objectives effectively alongside complementary products like custom fridge magnets for comprehensive promotional campaigns.

``` ## 14) FAQ ```html

Business Magnets FAQ

What material are custom business magnets made from?

Our business magnets use premium 30-mil magnetic sheeting with UV-resistant lamination for durability. This professional-grade material provides strong magnetic adhesion while remaining easily removable without surface damage. The lamination protects against fading, scratching, and weather exposure, ensuring long-lasting promotional effectiveness for indoor and outdoor applications.

What surfaces do business magnets stick to effectively?

Business magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel vehicle doors, appliances, filing cabinets, and metal display systems. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-magnetic materials. Before ordering, test your intended surface with a small magnet to confirm magnetic receptivity and ensure secure attachment for your specific application needs.

Can business magnets be cut to custom shapes?

Yes, we offer contour cutting to follow specific shapes including logos, text outlines, and custom designs. Standard options include rounded corners for vehicle applications and square cuts for clean geometric presentations. Rounded corners provide better aerodynamics for mobile advertising, while contour cutting creates unique promotional pieces that enhance brand recognition.

How do I prepare artwork for business magnet printing?

Vector-based files like .eps with outlined fonts produce optimal results, though high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also print effectively. Our design team provides artwork assistance, and order proofs allow design verification before production. For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate brand color reproduction through professional consultation.

What's the maximum size available for custom business magnets?

Business magnets can be printed up to 24" x 24" maximum dimensions, accommodating various promotional needs from compact contact information to large advertising displays. Custom sizing options provide flexibility for specific marketing requirements, vehicle dimensions, or display space constraints while maintaining strong magnetic adhesion across the entire surface area.

How long do business magnets maintain their effectiveness?

With proper care and appropriate surface application, business magnets maintain strong adhesion and vibrant graphics for several years. UV-resistant lamination prevents fading and weather damage, while the durable magnetic material retains holding strength through repeated repositioning. Regular cleaning and storage on flat surfaces when not in use extends their promotional lifespan significantly.
